purpose: Define measurable product, quality, technical-debt, release, and value metrics for Git Glide GUI.

package_change_surface_kib.description: Approximate changed package surface since the baseline Git tag.

net_package_growth_kib.description: Approximate net size growth of changed files since the baseline Git tag.

release_churn_ratio.description: Share of changed files that look like version/package/release churn.

feature_points_total.description: Total cumulative active feature value from metrics/feature_manifest.json.

technical_debt_points_total.description: Current technical-debt estimate from observable local signals.
technical_debt_points_total.formula: modularity_pressure + runtime_version_churn + docs_regression_risk + todo_debt + marker_test_brittleness + manual_release_debt + gui_test_gap

net_maturity_score.description: Feature value minus current technical debt.
